title: The Christmas Carol Concert
notes: Christmas carols crossover concert. Programme included Carol to the King, Lonely Shepherd, O Holy Night, Bell Song, I Will Follow Him.
full_description: An annual Christmas carol concert bringing together choral and orchestral performance in a programme of traditional carols and seasonal music — Silent Night, O Come All Ye Faithful, Hark! The Herald Angels Sing, The Twelve Days of Christmas — alongside choral settings and instrumental Christmas repertoire. A communal celebration of the festive season through music.
ai_summary: A traditional Christmas carol concert — soloists, choir, and orchestra in a programme of beloved carols and seasonal music for the festive season.
